publication_note: This dataset separates verified records, family allegations, expert material, and restricted sources. Inclusion does not establish authenticity, causation, guilt, or a final legal conclusion.

records.title: Key Evidence — Gina Gazvoda
records.summary: Curated case-evidence packet assembled for structured review by attorneys, journalists, advocates, experts, and independent reviewers.

provenance.notes: The packet combines multiple source types. Family summaries and allegations must be distinguished from official records and expert material.

records.redaction_notes: Public packet remains subject to continuing privacy and source review.
records.publication_authority: Family-authorized public index; source context required.

revision_history.change_summary: Added a stable V6 local viewer route with original-source fallback.

records.title: Gina Gazvoda Case Presentation
records.summary: The Gazvoda family's organized theory, arguments, anticipated defenses, and areas it believes require further investigation.

provenance.notes: This is the family's presentation and theory. It is not a court finding or official investigative conclusion.

records.redaction_notes: Public version remains subject to continuing privacy and legal review.
records.publication_authority: Family-authorized attributed position; not presented as a finding of guilt.

revision_history.change_summary: Classified as an attributed family position and added a stable V6 viewer route.

records.title: Gina Gazvoda Case Timeline
records.summary: Working chronology combining records, witness statements, family accounts, calculations, and unresolved timing questions.

provenance.notes: Timeline entries should be checked against cited underlying sources; estimates and recollections are not forensic findings.

records.redaction_notes: Public timeline remains subject to source-by-source review.
records.publication_authority: Family-authorized chronology; not a judicial finding.

revision_history.change_summary: Added a stable V6 local viewer route and explicit timeline limitations.

records.title: Signature Expert Report
records.summary: Expert analysis concerning signatures relevant to disputed estate and beneficiary documents.
records.source_name: Expert report supplied by the Gazvoda family

provenance.notes: Expert conclusions must be read within the report's scope, methodology, assumptions, and limitations.

records.redaction_notes: Public version remains subject to continuing source and privacy review.
records.publication_authority: Family-authorized public index; expert opinion is not a court finding or proof of homicide.

revision_history.change_summary: Added a stable V6 local viewer route and explicit scope limitation.

records.title: Affidavit V3
records.summary: Sworn family and witness statements addressing events before and after Gina Gazvoda's death and related document concerns.

provenance.notes: An affidavit records sworn statements and allegations by its declarants; it is not itself a final judicial finding.

records.redaction_notes: Public copy remains subject to legal and privacy review.
records.publication_authority: Family-authorized public index; affidavit status clearly labeled.

revision_history.change_summary: Added a stable V6 local viewer route and stronger attribution notice.

records.title: Medical-record archive
records.summary: Full medical records are preserved outside the public repository for authorized legal and expert review.

provenance.notes: Source files are intentionally excluded from the public Git repository.

records.redaction_notes: Full records remain restricted. Any future public excerpt requires relevance review, authority, third-party redaction, and publication logging.
records.publication_authority: Family-controlled restricted archive; no blanket public publication authorization recorded.

revision_history.change_summary: Retained metadata-only restricted status in V6; no medical source file was published.
